PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LI, GUO DING LI, TIAN YUAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GREGORES, JOANNA CHINN,WAYNE $6,200.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,200.00, ON AWARD OF ARBITRATOR DEFTS TO PAY $3200 TO GUO DING LI AND $3000 TO TIN YUEN LI. STATUTORY COSTS ARE AWARDED TO PLAINTIFFS
